title: Accessible Range Input

statement.markdown:
Create an accessible range input field with dynamic label and error message. The range input should be controlled by two separate text inputs and have an associated error message displayed below it. The error message should be hidden when the range input values are valid.
type: ### Requirements

constraints: {"type":"UI","value":"The range input should be controlled by two separate text inputs"}
{"type":"UI","value":"The range input should have an associated error message displayed below it"}
{"type":"Accessibility","value":"The error message should be hidden when the range input values are valid"}

starterCode.html: Error message
